chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 232 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A”. 2) For orders on Misc. No. 1355/2024. 3) For hearing of main case. 4) For orders on Misc. No. 1356/2024. 12.05.2025. Mr. S. Zaeem Haider, Advocate for Appellant. ________________ 1) Deferred. 2) Granted subject to all exceptions. 3 & 4) Learned Counsel under instructions does not press this High Court Appeal. Ordered accordingly. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
